inlineContent.text: SwiftMarkdownViewは、SwiftUIで美しいMarkdown表示を実現するライブラリです。
連結による高性能レンダリング、DesignSystemとの統合、
オプショナルな50+言語対応シンタックスハイライトを備えています。
連結による高性能レンダリング
シンタックスハイライト
: オプショナルモジュールで50+言語対応
: フローチャート、シーケンス図等をサポート
: Note、Warning、Tipなど24種類 + カスタム
: テーブル、タスクリスト、画像等
このパッケージは2つのモジュールで構成されています：
Markdownレンダリングのコアモジュール
HighlightJSによるシンタックスハイライト（オプション）

content.text: シンタックスハイライトを有効にする

abstract.text: SwiftUIネイティブなMarkdownレンダリングライブラリ。

abstract.text: : HighlightJSによる50+言語対応シンタックスハイライト
A SwiftUI view that renders Markdown content.
Catalog view for line break elements.
The state of a syntax highlighting operation.
A table style that looks like a card with rounded corners and shadow.
A type that can highlight source code asynchronously.
A heading style with dividers below H1 and H2 headings.
Catalog view for Mermaid diagram elements.
A row for displaying a catalog item in a list.
Catalog view for HeadingStyle configuration.
A list-based catalog view for compact layouts.
A single item in the Markdown catalog.
A Mermaid script provider that loads from the app bundle.
Markdownコードブロック内でMermaidダイアグラムを表示する方法を学びます。
A heading style with colored primary headings.
The main entry point for the Markdown catalog.
Catalog view for text style elements (bold, italic, strikethrough).
A Mermaid script provider that loads from jsDelivr CDN.
The default aside style with semantic colors for common aside kinds.
Maps Markdown heading levels to DesignSystem Typography tokens.
Represents the source of the Mermaid.js script.
Catalog view for CodeBlockStyle configuration.
The default link style using the primary color with underline.
Router for navigating between catalog views.
A minimal code block style without decorations.
Catalog view for SyntaxHighlighter configuration.
Color mappings for Markdown elements using DesignSystem ColorPalette.
A renderer for math expressions found in Markdown content.
Catalog view for TableStyle configuration.
A split-view catalog for regular layouts.
DesignSystem integration items for the catalog.
A card that displays Markdown source and its rendered preview.
Categories for the Markdown catalog.
Block-level element types for the catalog.
Catalog view for table elements.
Catalog view for link elements.
Catalog view for MarkdownRenderingOptions configuration.
Corner radius values for Markdown elements.
A classic web-style link appearance.
The default Mermaid script provider (CDN-based).
A protocol that defines the visual styling for links.
A bold link style with emphasis.
Configuration and style options for the catalog.
A terminal-inspired code block style.
Catalog view for thematic break (horizontal rule) elements.
A view for displaying Swift code snippets with syntax highlighting.
A view that renders Mermaid diagrams using WebKit.
Interactive playground for Markdown editing and preview.
Catalog view for inline code elements.
A compact heading style with reduced typography scale.
Catalog view for heading elements (H1-H6).
Catalog view for unordered (bulleted) list elements.
A protocol that defines the visual styling for aside blocks.
A plain text highlighter that applies no syntax highlighting.
A monochrome link style that blends with the text.
A minimal table style without borders.

Options for controlling Markdown rendering behavior.
Inline element types for the catalog.

A protocol that defines the visual styling for tables.
Catalog view for task list (checkbox) elements.
A protocol that defines the visual styling for code blocks.
The default code block style with sensible defaults.

The default heading style using DesignSystem typography tokens.
Catalog view for image elements.

Catalog view for ordered (numbered) list elements.

The default table style with subtle borders and header highlighting.
The default math renderer: shows LaTeX source without typesetting.
An adaptive view that uses native WebView on iOS 26+ or falls back to code display.
Catalog view for code block elements.
Catalog view for paragraph elements.
A single-line text view that typesets embedded math inline.
A Markdown view that renders the whole document into a
TextKit 2
text view, so text selection runs continuously across blocks (heading →
paragraph → list …) and the system Copy yields the selected readable text —
the behaviour SwiftUI’s per-block
rendering structurally cannot provide.
A table style with alternating row colors for better readability.
Spacing values for Markdown layout using DesignSystem tokens.
A placeholder view for Mermaid diagrams on older OS versions.
A protocol that defines how to provide the Mermaid.js script for diagram rendering.
